creator: egalois@concentric.net
text:
Unfortunately, out of the box, Arena is the only visible means to look at 
your site. Arena crashes constantly or simply refuses to work at all 
sometimes. However, today your web site is not co-existing with
Netscape Communicator either. So the problem maybe in your web page.

Fix: 

Provide a pushbutton means of downloading netscape or some browser that works.
